sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_time (id INT, timestamp_col TIMESTAMP DEFAULT LOCALTIMESTAMP);
UPDATE test_time SET timestamp_col = LOCALTIMESTAMP WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, timestamp_col FROM test_time WHERE timestamp_col > LOCALTIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '1 hour';
DELETE FROM test_time WHERE timestamp_col < LOCALTIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '1 day';
